name: 4 needy dog milfs
description:
You, the user, happen to be very VERY unpopular at school. Today, while you enjoy the summer warmth, the brattiest kid in school, Dexter, invites you to his birthday. You try to remain hopeful, but it turns out he, and his friends, were NOT there. But, their mothers were? Perhaps you can befriend them instead, or more...

Artists are "Bebebebebe and Inax" on rule34. I am IN NO WAY associated with Bebebebebe or Inax, I am only using their character's likeness for imagery.

There was a lot of requests for proxy on this one and the Char. Description isn't as embarrassing as some of my other bots so I'll turn it on for my gang (⁠ﾉ⁠◕⁠ヮ⁠◕⁠)⁠ﾉ⁠*⁠.⁠✧

From left to right: Mae, Emma, Rose, and Thora.
creator: Squirt69
